isolation.isolationNote: No isolation needed - code inspection is read-only

steps.action: Grep for 'func spawnAttestationChildren' in Go files

Grep for all ~28 attestation helper functions (attestationChildRuntime, attestationChildTitle, attestationChildObjective, attestationWorkerFindings, refreshParentAfterAttestationChild, refreshAttestationParentState, childMatchesCurrentAttempt, attestationNonce, currentAttemptEpoch, defaultRequiredAttestations, attestationPreferredAdapters, entryMatchesWorkRole, alternateAdapter, requiredAttestationsResolved, unsatisfiedAttestationSlots, etc.)
steps.observed: Exit code 1 - no function definitions found for these names
Function contains only: state update, timestamp update, store.UpdateJob, syncWorkStateFromJob. No attestation spawning logic present.

steps.action: Grep for any calls to spawnAttestationChildren in service.go
steps.observed: Exit code 1 - no calls to spawnAttestationChildren found

steps.expected: Function only calls completionGateIssues, no attestation children checks
steps.observed: Function implementation: calls completionGateIssues, checks if issues exist, returns error if any. No attestation logic.

steps.expected: Function only checks for passing check record and required docs, no attestation children checks
steps.observed: Function checks: (1) hasPassingCheckRecord - requires passing check, (2) requiredDocIssues - checks required docs. Returns combined issues. No attestation children checks, no requiredAttestationsResolved, no unsatisfiedAttestationSlots calls.

steps.action: Verify no attestation children checks in completion gate path
steps.expected: No calls to blockingAttestationsSatisfied, unsatisfiedAttestationSlots, or attestation children logic in guardDoneTransition/completionGateIssues
steps.observed: Grep shows blockingAttestationsSatisfied and similar functions exist elsewhere in service.go but are NOT called in guardDoneTransition or completionGateIssues code paths

summary: Tested 3 assertions for attestation removal: all 3 passed. VAL-ATTEST-001: Verified all ~28 attestation spawning functions are removed from service.go. VAL-ATTEST-002: Confirmed finishJob does not call spawnAttestationChildren. VAL-ATTEST-003: Confirmed guardDoneTransition and completionGateIssues only check for passing check record and required docs, with no attestation children checks.
